things.name: Doctor's Cave Beach
things.description: Jamaica's most famous bathing beach with crystal-clear turquoise water in the bay

things.name: Rose Hall Great House
things.description: Plantation great house haunted by the White Witch - Annie Palmer who murdered three husbands

things.name: Hip Strip (Gloucester Avenue)
things.description: Montego Bay's main tourist strip with beach bars, restaurants and craft markets

things.name: Dunn's River Falls Climb
things.description: Climb the famous terraced waterfall in a human chain - Jamaica's signature experience

things.name: Chukka Caribbean Adventures
things.description: Zip-lines, ATV tours, horseback riding and river tubing in the Jamaican hills

things.name: Sam Sharpe Square
things.description: Named after the National Hero who led the Christmas Rebellion of 1831

things.name: Pelican Bar (offshore)
things.description: Bar built on stilts in the sea 1km offshore accessible only by boat

things.name: Negril Cliffs & Rick's Cafe
things.description: 35m cliff diving at sunset at the legendary Rick's Cafe in Negril

things.name: Scotchies Jerk Centre
things.description: The best jerk pork and chicken on the island - cooked over pimento wood

things.name: Blue Mountain Coffee Experience
things.description: Tour and tasting of the world's finest coffee on the slopes of the Blue Mountains
